arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Barnsley – League Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester United turn their attention to Carabao Cup action on Tuesday night, as the Red Devils welcome League One outfit Barnsley to Old Trafford. The Tykes have already beaten two teams in this competition, with a penalty shootout victory away at Wigan in the first round followed by an upset win over Yorkshire rivals Sheffield […] The post Manchester United vs Barnsley – League Match Preview first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United 'hand' Erik ten Hag deadline to avoid the sack
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly not willing to give Erik ten Hag any assurances over the safety of his job until improvements are seen on the pitch in the near future.

arts.ttl: Manchester United target Nypan soars in valuation - Norway market value update
arts.sum: The intermediary Eliteserien market value update on Transfermarkt was released this afternoon - September 17th - and several talented players received significant updates. Unlike the top...

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand spots Bruno Fernandes and Marcus Rashford incident at Man United training
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has cut a gloomy figure for much of the past year, but Rio Ferdinand was heartened to see the forward in high spirits with Bruno Fernandes during Man Utd training

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho's 'behaviour in training' leaves Enzo Maresca with 'clear view' on attitude
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho has already made quite the impact at Chelsea where he assisted Christopher Nkunku's winner against Bournemouth in his first Premier League game in over a year

arts.ttl: Norwegian wonderkid Nypan speaks of 'dream' to play for Man Utd
arts.sum: Rosenborg BK’s 17-year-old wonderkid Sverre Halseth Nypan has opened up about his dream of one day playing for Manchester United . “When I hear names like Manchester United, I think it would be a bad idea,” Amankwah told TV 2 .

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd handed Musiala boost; Liverpool consider Gomes
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are struggling to agree terms with Jamal Musiala over a new contract, which has alerted Manchester United to his potential availability in the near future. Real Madrid and Barcelona remain in a battle to sign Fabian Ruiz from PSG.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag issues warning to Antony over Man Utd role
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag has warned Antony that he has to fight for his place in the lineup after falling down the Old Trafford pecking order. Amad Diallo and Alejandro Garnacho have both been preferred at right wing so far this season, and though Ten Hag has usually been a defender of Antony, he changed his tune slightly at a press conference ahead of Tuesday's Carabao Cup tie with Barnsley.

arts.ttl: Anthony Martial 'closing in' on new club after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Martial failed to find a new club during the summer window despite leaving United at the end of June upon the expiry of his contract. In recent weeks, a deal with Brazilian side Flamengo fell through, but Fabrizio Romano reports Martial is 'closing in' on a move to AEK instead.

arts.ttl: Manchester United could hand first-team debuts to two players everyone is talking about
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Barnsley in the Carabao Cup on Tuesday and two youngsters could make their full debuts.
